__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Trundholm Sun Chariot,Cai Gen Tan,Perseus and Medusa,Kepler's Laws,Khafre Enthroned
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per red reward from turning the Pendulum, Snail DEF +10; Red reward(s) obtained: 60/60
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
